name: DOGE Range Failure Reacceptance v1
thesis: In choppy DOGE 4h conditions, false breaks from local balance can mean-revert once price re-enters value. The edge should come from broad reacceptance after a failed excursion, not exact one-bar hero timing.
edge_mechanism: range failure mean reversion after reacceptance
invalidation_condition: Abort if walk-forward results show low participation, zero trades on valid data, or no post-cost edge.

long: Take profit: EMA_50 or 1.6 * ATR_14, whichever comes first
short: Take profit: EMA_50 or 1.6 * ATR_14, whichever comes first
